---
title: "Support"
subtitle: "Thank you for your support"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
toc: true
---

<!--Please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

## Acknowledgment

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

We are grateful for the support from the following grant funders:

- Alfred P. Sloan Foundation
- ClimateWorks Foundation
- Environmental Defense Fund
- Growald Climate Fund
- Sequoia Climate Foundation
- California China Climate Institute
- National Science Foundation
- New York State Department of Environmental Conservation
- Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory
- Stockholm Environment Institute
- World Resources Institute
- Asia Society

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

We appreciate the support of the following institutions and programs:

- [CUNY Institute for Demographic Research](https://www.cuny.edu/about/centers-and-institutes/demographic-research/)
- [Marxe School of Public and International Affairs](https://marxe.baruch.cuny.edu/)
- [Earth and Environmental Sciences, CUNY Graduate Center](https://www.gc.cuny.edu/earth-and-environmental-sciences) 
- [CUNY Climate Consortium](https://www.cuny.edu/research/research-development-programs/cuny-climate-consortium/)
- [CUNY Immersive Research Experience – Climate Scholars Program](https://blogs.baruch.cuny.edu/climateaction/cuny-climate-scholars-fellowship/)
- [New York Retirement and Disability Research Center](https://www.nyrdrc.org/)
- [Quantitative Methods in the Social Sciences, CUNY Graduate Center](https://www.gc.cuny.edu/quantitative-methods-social-sciences)

And previously:

- Peking University 
- Columbia University
- University of California, Berkeley
- Stanford University
- Stony Brook University

:::

:::
